## Appendix: Use of Generative AI

### Declaration

I used generative AI tools (ChatGPT) to assist with this assignment.

The AI was used for:
- Debugging R code (e.g., file path errors)
- Improving English expression and grammar

All outputs generated by AI were carefully reviewed, modified, and adapted to ensure accuracy and relevance to the assignment. The final work reflects my own understanding.

### Evidence of AI Usage

Below are screenshots of my interactions with ChatGPT related to this assignment.
